overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage depicting a character in a leather jacket walking through a 1960s urban residential neighborhood resembling New Orleans. The character navigates wet sidewalks lined with vintage cars and traditional wooden shotgun homes, passing an institutional building before stopping at a crosswalk to wait for traffic.

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a wet residential sidewalk lined with vintage 1950s cars. A cream-colored sedan drives past on the left as the character approaches a traditional wooden shotgun house with a raised front porch. Power lines and utility poles line the street overhead.

events.description: passing the wooden house porch, view opens to reveal church steeple in distance
slight turn as sidewalk curves past residential properties

agents.ego_description: continuing along sidewalk past residential houses with church visible ahead

notable_agents.action: person walking in opposite direction on the sidewalk

segments.scene_description: Moving past the wooden house, the view opens to reveal a church with a tall steeple in the distance. The character passes a pedestrian walking the opposite direction while continuing along the cracked concrete sidewalk. Parked cars line the right side of the street.

passing through gate entrance of fenced property

segments.scene_description: The character walks alongside a large institutional building with a wrought iron fence and brick pillars. Overgrown vegetation lines the fence line. The character passes through a gate entrance where a person stands near the fence, moving from the residential area into a more enclosed institutional zone.

events.description: approaching crosswalk and stopping to wait for passing vehicles
character stops walking and looks left to check for traffic

agents.ego_description: stopping at crosswalk to wait for vintage cars to pass before crossing

notable_agents.action: green vintage sedan driving through the intersection

entered.detail: painted white zebra stripes marking pedestrian crossing area
pair of elevated wooden homes with front stairs across the street

segments.scene_description: The character reaches a street intersection and stops at the white-striped crosswalk. Several vintage cars including a green sedan drive through the intersection. Across the street, elevated wooden homes with front stairs are visible. The character waits for a gap in traffic to cross.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a wet residential neighborhood that gradually transitions from a street of vintage homes into a more enclosed institutional area before ending at a busy intersection. It begins with the character walking along a damp sidewalk past parked 1950s cars and a traditional wooden shotgun house under a canopy of utility poles. As the character moves forward, the view opens to reveal a distant church steeple and a passing pedestrian before the environment shifts toward a large institutional building enclosed by a wrought iron fence and overgrown vegetation. The camera then follows the character through a gated entrance and along the brick pillars of the facility, moving away from the residential charm toward the edge of the block. Finally, the scene concludes as the character reaches a white-striped crosswalk and stops to wait while vintage sedans drive through the intersection in front of elevated wooden homes.
